title: EngagementRecord
description: Architecture contract for an Engagement as held in Peak's controlled engagement database/storage (the system of record for live engagement data) — NOT in this repository. This is a portable, storage-agnostic shape, not a database migration and not a stored record. No engagement-record instances are committed to the repo; real engagement records live in controlled storage under authorization. AgentNet grounding of such records is intended future architecture, not implemented.

engagement_id.description: Stable identifier for the engagement in controlled storage. Convention: 'eng_' + slug.

client_id.description: Identifier for the client in controlled storage. Convention: 'client_' + slug.

engagement_label.description: Human-readable engagement label (held in controlled storage, not the repo).

data_class.description: Data classification (see CONTROLLED_DATA_ARCHITECTURE.md). An engagement record is live client data.

sensitivity_class.description: Handling sensitivity for the engagement's data.

authorization_scope.description: What the client engagement authorizes Peak to hold and use (free-text reference to the governing authorization).

packet_ids.description: EngagementPacket ids associated with this engagement (held in controlled storage).

review_status.description: Governance review state of the engagement record.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of record creation in controlled storage.
